declared_axis_rationale: The min-fill heuristic minimizes the number of new edges added to the interaction graph during variable elimination. This directly minimizes the size of the largest clique created, which corresponds to the maximum intermediate factor size. By using min-fill, the maximum scope size is kept to 6 variables (64 entries), making exact computation highly tractable.
